'''chashasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kadupul|kadupul]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kadupul|kadupul]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chashasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæshæshæth|chæshæshæth]] || [[word:chæshæshæj|chæshæshæj]] || [[word:chæshæshæsh|chæshæshæsh]] || [[word:chæshæshæ|chæshæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashashashath|chashashashath]] || [[word:chashashashaj|chashashashaj]] || [[word:chashashashash|chashashashash]] || [[word:chashashasha|chashashasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashashath|chashashath]] || [[word:chashashaj|chashashaj]] || [[word:chashashash|chashashash]] || [[word:chashasha|chashasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashafshath|chashafshath]] || [[word:chashafshaj|chashafshaj]] || [[word:chashafshash|chashafshash]] || [[word:chashafshaf|chashafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chashashatha|chashashatha]] || [[word:chashashaja|chashashaja]] || [[word:chashashasha|chashashasha]] || [[word:chashashaka|chashashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chashashath|chashashath]] || [[word:chashashaj|chashashaj]] || [[word:chashashash|chashashash]] || [[word:chashasha|chashasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chashashathal|chashashathal]] || [[word:chashashajal|chashashajal]] || [[word:chashashashal|chashashashal]] || [[word:chashashakal|chashashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chashashathatha|chashashathatha]] || [[word:chashashajaja|chashashajaja]] || [[word:chashashashasha|chashashashasha]] || [[word:chashashaka|chashashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chashashathan|chashashathan]] || [[word:chashashajan|chashashajan]] || [[word:chashashashan|chashashashan]] || [[word:chashashakan|chashashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chashashathaoro|chashashathaoro]] || [[word:chashashajaoro|chashashajaoro]] || [[word:chashashashaoro|chashashashaoro]] || [[word:chashashakaoro|chashashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
